_readme: v3 sprite manifest. Every visual renders via a procedural baked fallback; drop assets/<key>.png to upgrade any sprite (SPRITES.load() prefers the PNG). Keys map 1:1 to SPRITES.define() entries in game.html.
style: Clean 2D game art, bold silhouette, soft shading, sci-fi aesthetic. Transparent background. No text, no drop shadow, no background scene.

sprites.brief: Mining tug spaceship, 3/4 iso view, nose right and slightly up, gold-yellow hull, silver swept wings, blue engine exhaust port, no background.
Space station ring, 3/4 iso, silver-blue ring with 6 spokes, central blue glowing docking hub, no background.
Grey debris asteroid, 3/4 iso, rough irregular sphere, crater pits, matte grey, no background.
Copper-orange asteroid, 3/4 iso, rough sphere, copper-brown tones with orange metallic veins, no background.
Silver asteroid, 3/4 iso, sphere shape, bright silver-white metallic surface, reflective sheen, no background.
Gold asteroid, 3/4 iso, sphere shape, deep gold and amber tones, bright gold vein glints, no background.
Platinum asteroid, 3/4 iso, sphere shape, pale teal-cyan metallic surface, iridescent glow, exotic and rare-looking, no background.
Ice world planet, front-on sphere, pale blue-white globe, cracked ice surface texture, thin cyan atmosphere halo, no background.
Fire world planet, front-on sphere, deep orange-red globe, glowing lava crack surface, smoky red atmosphere, no background.
Gas giant planet, front-on sphere, swirling purple and green bands, lavender atmosphere halo, large majestic scale, no background.
Tumbling fuel canister, 3/4 iso, cylindrical, grey and rust-orange, dented, space debris, no background.
Broken solar panel fragment, 3/4 iso, thin rectangular piece, dark frame with blue-silver reflective panel cells, no background.
Cargo crate tumbling in space, 3/4 iso, square box shape, worn yellow paint, metal corner brackets, no background.
Small irregular rock debris, 3/4 iso, jagged chunk, dark grey, no background.
